Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Video.summary: Mike Hernandez is here to take the Bantamweight title away from Jesse Arnett. Coming off of a 6 win streak, he is in the Hard Knocks cage for nothing else but the belt!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Miles Anstead
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Miles Anstead

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Miles Anstead
Out of the Cage - Miles Anstead
Out of the Cage - Miles Anstead

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Chaleur Jones
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Chaleur Jones
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Chaleur Jones

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Chaleur Jones
Fighter Profile: Chaleur Jones
Fighter Profile: Chaleur Jones

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Vanessa Bellegarde as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! First up is the dynamic amateur bout Dylan Schellenberg vs. Gerra Gossen. This is immediately followed by amateurs Mike Parsons vs. debut Duncan Henry. Both of these fighters are keen to put up an entertaining fight for the audience. Don't miss it!

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

Video.summary: It is Striker vs. Grappler! At Hard Knocks 50, John Woo and Jordan Van Heek fight an impressive short round. This episode of Out of the Cage focuses on John Woo and his path to his amateur debut fight.

Video.summary: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Colton Boxell.
